title: Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary (formerly Chapramari Wildlife Reserve, pron: ˌʧʌprəˈmɑ:rɪ or ˌʧæprəˈmɑ:rɪ) is close to the Gorumara National Park.
overview.description: Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary (formerly Chapramari Wildlife Reserve, pron: ˌʧʌprəˈmɑ:rɪ or ˌʧæprəˈmɑ:rɪ) is close to the Gorumara National Park. Chapramari is about 30 kilometres from Chalsa and Lataguri in northern West Bengal, India. The total coverage of the forest is 960 hectares.

topPlaces.name: Murti, Jalpaiguri
topPlaces.description: Murti is an inhabited place in the Matiali CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Nagrakata (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Nagrakata is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.The Nagrakata CD block has an area of 397.48 km2. It has 1 panchayat samity, 5 gram panchayats, 91 gram sansads (village councils), 34 mouzas and 33 inhabited villages.

topPlaces.name: Mangalbari
topPlaces.description: Mangalbari is a census town in the Matiali CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Sulkapara
topPlaces.description: Sulkapara is a village and a gram panchayat in the Nagrakata CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Nagrakata
topPlaces.description: Nagrakata is a village in the Nagrakata community development block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district, West Bengal.National Highway 17 passes through Nagrakata. It is a station on the New Jalpaiguri-Alipurduar-Samuktala Road Line.

topPlaces.name: Batabari Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Batabari Tea Garden is a village and a gram panchayat in the Matiali CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Matiali (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Matiali is a community development block (CD block) in the eastern Sivalik Hills that forms an administrative division in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Chalsa, India
topPlaces.description: Chalsa (also known as Chalsa Mahabari) is a census town in the Matiali CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chapramari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Murti, Jalpaiguri, Nagrakata (community development block), Mangalbari, Sulkapara, Nagrakata.
